debug_info.goal:
a b c : ℝ
h₀ : 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ 0 < c
h₁ : c < a + b
h₂ : b < a + c
h₃ : a < b + c
⊢ 0 ≤ a ^ 2 * b * (a - b) + b ^ 2 * c * (b - c) + c ^ 2 * a * (c - a)

proof:
obtain ha_max | hb_max | hc_max : (b ≤ a ∧ c ≤ a) ∨ (a ≤ b ∧ c ≤ b) ∨ (a ≤ c ∧ b ≤ c) := by
    rcases le_total a b with hab | hba
    · rcases le_total b c with hbc | hcb
      · right; right; exact ⟨hab.trans hbc, hbc⟩
      · right; left; exact ⟨hab, hcb⟩
    · rcases le_total a c with hac | hca
      · right; right; exact ⟨hac, hba.trans hac⟩
      · left; exact ⟨hba, hca⟩
  · rw [show a^2 * b * (a - b) + b^2 * c * (b - c) + c^2 * a * (c - a) = a * (b - c)^2 * (b + c - a) + b * (a - b) * (a - c) * (a + b - c) by ring]
    apply add_nonneg
    · apply mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.1.le (pow_two_nonneg _)) (by linarith)
    · apply mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.2.1.le (by linarith)) (by linarith)) (by linarith)
  · rw [show a^2 * b * (a - b) + b^2 * c * (b - c) + c^2 * a * (c - a) = b * (c - a)^2 * (c + a - b) + c * (b - c) * (b - a) * (b + c - a) by ring]
    apply add_nonneg
    · apply mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.2.1.le (pow_two_nonneg _)) (by linarith)
    · apply mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.2.2.le (by linarith)) (by linarith)) (by linarith)
  · rw [show a^2 * b * (a - b) + b^2 * c * (b - c) + c^2 * a * (c - a) = c * (a - b)^2 * (a + b - c) + a * (c - a) * (c - b) * (c + a - b) by ring]
    apply add_nonneg
    · apply mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.2.2.le (pow_two_nonneg _)) (by linarith)
    · apply mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.1.le (by linarith)) (by linarith)) (by linarith)
successful_attempts:
obtain ha_max | hb_max | hc_max : (b ≤ a ∧ c ≤ a) ∨ (a ≤ b ∧ c ≤ b) ∨ (a ≤ c ∧ b ≤ c) := by
    rcases le_total a b with hab | hba
    · rcases le_total b c with hbc | hcb
      · right; right; exact ⟨hab.trans hbc, hbc⟩
      · right; left; exact ⟨hab, hcb⟩
    · rcases le_total a c with hac | hca
      · right; right; exact ⟨hac, hba.trans hac⟩
      · left; exact ⟨hba, hca⟩
  · rw [show a^2 * b * (a - b) + b^2 * c * (b - c) + c^2 * a * (c - a) = a * (b - c)^2 * (b + c - a) + b * (a - b) * (a - c) * (a + b - c) by ring]
    apply add_nonneg
    · apply mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.1.le (pow_two_nonneg _)) (by linarith)
    · apply mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.2.1.le (by linarith)) (by linarith)) (by linarith)
  · rw [show a^2 * b * (a - b) + b^2 * c * (b - c) + c^2 * a * (c - a) = b * (c - a)^2 * (c + a - b) + c * (b - c) * (b - a) * (b + c - a) by ring]
    apply add_nonneg
    · apply mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.2.1.le (pow_two_nonneg _)) (by linarith)
    · apply mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.2.2.le (by linarith)) (by linarith)) (by linarith)
  · rw [show a^2 * b * (a - b) + b^2 * c * (b - c) + c^2 * a * (c - a) = c * (a - b)^2 * (a + b - c) + a * (c - a) * (c - b) * (c + a - b) by ring]
    apply add_nonneg
    · apply mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.2.2.le (pow_two_nonneg _)) (by linarith)
    · apply mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.1.le (by linarith)) (by linarith)) (by linarith)
